title: settles_within(k)
manager: A `settles_within(k)` property — assert that the machine reaches a stable configuration within k steps — via bounded exploration. This is the practical liveness question most people actually have ("does this converge, and how fast"), answered by bounded model checking so it stays decidable, and it is the bridge from pure safety properties toward real-time-ish guarantees about responsiveness.
cs: `settles_within(k)` via bounded exploration; bounded liveness; decidable by construction; the convergence question over an explicit step budget.
